query: Find 10 buildings in Trondheim municipality that intersect quick-clay hazard areas with high risk class and are closest to the municipality centroid, sorted by shortest distance first.

1.description: Fetch Trondheim municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: Fetch quick-clay hazard areas with high risk class in Trondheim

3.description: Fetch buildings in Trondheim that intersect quick-clay hazard areas

4.description: Join buildings with quick-clay hazard areas to confirm intersection

5.description: Calculate distance from each building to Trondheim municipality centroid

6.description: Sort buildings by distance to centroid (ascending)

args.sql:
SELECT
    kommunenummer::text AS kommunenummer,
    ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade, 4326))::json->>'geometry' AS geom_geojson,
    ST_Centroid(omrade) AS centroid
FROM
    kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE
    LOWER(administrativenhetnavn) = 'trondheim';
